title: Eziglide 50-Pack Ballpoint Pen Set, 5 Assorted Colours – Medium Point Nib (1.0mm) for Precise Writing & Ergonomic Grip – Writing Pens for Home, Office, Teachers, Exams, Work, and Stationary Use
features: Ultimate Quality : EziGlide's unique biro pen style tips are precisely engineered to ensure you enjoy the ultimate easy writing experience - Designed for all your writing, drawing and colouring needs
Ink: EziGlide Biro Pens contain an advanced ink formula providing you with an ultra-smooth writing sensation and quick dry to prevent smudging on the page making them perfect school essentials
Solid Colour Barrel : The EziGlide Pen barrels have a solid colour barrel which matches the colour of the ink within to help differentiate what is in your Pen Pot!
Safety : EziGLIDE's ventilated safety cap conforms to BS7272 standard, making them perfect for use in schools. The lid fits snuggly on the top to prevent misplacement while the pens in use.

Assorted Colour Pens, Pack of 50 - Colours included - Black, Blue, Green, Red and Purple - Medium Point Nib (1.0mm) The Eziglide pens nib is fixed to ensure the pen can`t be taken to bits, designed with schools in mind to prevent unscrewing/or general fiddling!
